hypothesis: On XAUUSD M15, price closes outside Bollinger(20, 2.0) combined with RSI(2) extremes revert to the middle band within 20 bars, but only when ADX<22 (range regime) and ATR percentile between 20-80 (avoid dead and panic markets).

regime_filter.rule: adx(14) < 22 AND atr_percentile(14, lookback=200) BETWEEN 0.20 AND 0.80

notes: Mean reversion baseline inspired by mean-reversion-scalper-mql5 (MIT). Tuned for XAU M15 volatility.
